title: Zoro’s Fever Worsens
description: On pages 0–3, zoro’s fever worsens focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.
scene: On pages 0–3, zoro’s fever worsens focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: With those wounds and that fever, he should be barely hanging onto consciousness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...but now's not the time to be worrying about that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The only one who can cut through this crisis is brother!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's the matter Rormoa Zoro? You already look so exhausted.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Damn it... I feel like I'm going to pass out any moment now. I thought moving around a bit might lower my fever,but it's only gotten worse...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: B-Brother! We already threw our swords!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Didn't you ask for our swords!? Catch them!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll show you the vast gap in skill that's unsurpass- able for a human with only 2 arms!

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: The six swords style that can only be used by having 6 arms and a supple body...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
